latest.title: Which Foundation Model Is Best at Empathetic Decision-Making in High-Stakes Conversations?
latest.description:
This article evaluates a range of foundation models based on how well they can formulate solutions. By considering intangible, qualitative factors such as relationships, past experiences, empathy, leverage, and realism, we can more clearly see what each model focuses on in a prompt.

Using controlled prompts across multiple AWS Bedrock models, the study compares how effectively each handles emotional nuance, financial constraints, and negotiation strategy to determine which is most "empathy oriented."

latest.title: Your Cloud Journey Starts Here—With AWS
latest.description:
🚀 Ready to start your cloud journey?
Explore how Amazon Web Services can help you build real-world skills, work on projects, and unlock new opportunities.
Start small, stay consistent, and grow with the cloud ☁️

#students #https://builder.aws.com/start?trk=7cff29b7-5b80-4b00-adf1-e79ab5ac6509&sc_channel=el

latest.title: Deploying MongoDB MCP Server on AWS Bedrock AgentCore
latest.description: Learn how to deploy the MongoDB MCP Server as a managed container on AWS Bedrock AgentCore, giving your AI agents direct access to MongoDB databases and Atlas through the Model Context Protocol.

latest.title: AWS: A Nuvem que Você já Usa (Mesmo sem Saber)
latest.description: Descubra como a AWS domina 28% do mercado global de nuvem e por que essa tecnologia não é exclusiva para especialistas de TI. Este artigo desmistifica a computação em nuvem, revelando sua presença invisível em nosso cotidiano — do streaming ao banco digital. Se você é iniciante, confira o guia prático com os primeiros cursos essenciais (como o Cloud Practitioner) para dominar a infraestrutura que move o mundo moderno. A nuvem é para todos; aprenda por onde começar sua jornada.

latest.title: Da raiz ao futuro: A Nuvem como fonte de crescimento
latest.description: A nuvem da AWS abre caminhos de inclusão e aprendizado, transformando desafios em oportunidades e raízes em futuros possíveis.

latest.title: Nuvem sem barreiras: A tecnologia como ferramenta de protagonismo para estudantes de todas as áreas e não só computação.
latest.description: Neste artigo, mostro que a nuvem não é exclusividade da TI e como ela é essencial em áreas como a engenharia biomédica. Compartilho minha jornada no programa de líder estudantil da AWS para apresentar como qualquer estudante pode aprender tecnologia do zero com cursos gratuitos. Também discuto a importância da representatividade feminina para motivar mais mulheres nesse espaço.

latest.title: Claude Opus 4.7 on Amazon Bedrock: APIs, Features, and Migration Guide
latest.description: "A practical walkthrough of every API path for Claude Opus 4.7 on Bedrock — Messages API, InvokeModel, and Converse — with code examples, feature comparison, and breaking changes to watch for when upgrading from Opus 4.6."

latest.title: 5 ferramentas e recursos da AWS que todo universitário deveria conhecer
latest.description:
Sou estudante de Ciência da Computação e, quando decidi que queria aprender sobre cloud, me senti um pouco perdido. 
A área de tecnologia muda muito rápido e, às vezes, a sala de aula não dá conta de mostrar todas as ferramentas práticas que o mercado exige. 
Foi quando descobri o AWS Builder Center, um espaço que reúne tudo o que um estudante precisa para começar.
 Hoje, quero compartilhar 5 recursos dessa plataforma que mudaram a minha forma de estudar e que todo universitário precisa conhecer.

latest.title: A Convergência entre Academia e Mercado: Arquitetando o Futuro com o AWS Builder Center
latest.description: Uma análise sobre como a integração entre o ensino superior, a prática profissional em órgãos públicos e o ecossistema AWS acelera a formação de desenvolvedores de alta performance.

latest.title: AWS Global Accelerators are preffered over Route 53 for Multi-Region Failover why?
latest.description: Understanding how real production systems use Internal Backbone Network, Edge Network and Anycast IP work and routing through Regional ALB’s!

latest.title: How I Used My Freshman Engineering Skills to Build My First Personal AWS Project
latest.description: A behind-the-scenes look at how I built my first personal AWS project, an IoT availability display for my research professor's office door using Swift, API Gateway, Lambda, and an Arduino with a 3D printed enclosure. As well as why I wish I'd had AWS Builder Center while figuring it all out, and why engineering students shouldn't wait to explore it.

latest.title: O que é computação em nuvem e por que você precisa saber?
latest.description: Neste artigo, entenda o que é computação em nuvem, por que esse modelo transformou a forma como empresas e desenvolvedores trabalham, e por que você — mesmo estudante ou profissional iniciante — precisa saber disso para não ficar para trás em 2026.

latest.title: Cloud Computing e Minha Experiência Com o AWS Builder Center
latest.description: Neste artigo compartilho como estou começando minha jornada na computação em nuvem e por que esse tema se tornou tão importante para mim como estudante. Explico de forma simples o que é cloud, como ela já faz parte do nosso dia a dia e como o AWS Builder Center tem me ajudado a aprender, ganhar confiança e dar meus primeiros passos na área. É um texto pensado especialmente para quem também está começando e quer entender por onde iniciar.

latest.title: AWS Builder Center 101: Guia do Aluno
latest.description: Chegou a hora de entender de uma vez por todas O QUE é o AWS Builder Center, COMO tirar o máximo de proveito daqui e os próximos passos para o estudante interessado nesse mundo!

latest.title: Meu início no Programa de Líderes Estudantis da AWS Builder Center
latest.description: Estou iniciando no Programa de Líderes Estudantis da Amazon Web Services para desenvolver habilidades em tecnologia, liderança e comunicação.

latest.title: Introducing the Amazon Nova Act MCP Server for AI Agents
latest.description: A practical guide to running Amazon Nova Act through MCP, from quick API key setup to advanced AWS-native browser automation.

latest.title: How to integrate AWS DevOps Agent with GitHub
latest.description: This guide walks you through integrating GitHub with AWS DevOps Agent so that the agent can access your code repositories and receive deployment events during incident investigations. The integration enables AWS DevOps Agent to correlate code changes with operational incidents, reducing mean time to resolution (MTTR) for any GitHub workflow failures.

latest.title: How AWS Free Tier helped me learn by doing
latest.description: #students

latest.title: Amazon Web Services (AWS): Powering the Future of Cloud Computing
latest.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) is a leading cloud platform by Amazon that provides scalable, on-demand computing services over the internet. From virtual servers like Amazon EC2 to storage solutions such as Amazon S3, AWS enables businesses to build, deploy, and manage applications efficiently without the need for physical infrastructure. Its flexibility, global reach, and pay-as-you-go pricing model have made it a backbone of modern digital innovation.

latest.title: AWS a cloud platform
latest.description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) is a comprehensive cloud platform providing fully managed services for computing, storage, and databases on a global infrastructure.It enables businesses to scale faster, reduce costs, and deploy applications instantly using a pay-as-you-go model. For more information,

trending.title: AWS Summit London Attendee Exclusive: Builder Question of the Day
trending.description: If you're attending the AWS Summit in London, come say hi at the Developer Community Zone in the Expo and get involved in our Builder Question of the Day challenge!

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: NeuroVoice
trending.description: Small moments, repeated daily, reveal what single snapshots never can - patterns that quietly signal neurological risk. NeuroVoice is a multimodal Parkinson’s screening platform that tracks pattern over time to detect subtle neurological changes early.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: ASET – Academic Safety and Evidencing Truth
trending.description: ASET (Academic Safety and Evidencing Truth) is an AI-powered claim verification platform built on AWS that verifies scientific claims against 1.2M+ peer-reviewed papers across 8 domains — and automatically fetches and permanently stores new papers from arXiv, PubMed, etc. when gaps are found, making the knowledge base self-growing with every query. From typed claims to YouTube videos and uploaded documents, ASET delivers evidence-backed trust scores in under 10 seconds.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Global Impact AI Navigator
trending.description: Global Impact AI Navigator (GIAN) is a multi-agent AI platform built on Amazon Bedrock that transforms a raw idea into a complete strategic package in under 60 seconds — SWOT diagnostic, live-grounded funding discovery, personalized roadmap, and a context-aware advisor. Designed for innovators in emerging markets, it democratizes access to the strategic guidance that usually requires expensive consultants or elite networks.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Perspective
trending.description: Perspective is an AI-powered mental health companion that extracts clinical insight from free-form speech — no mood scales required. Using 4-cluster parallel extraction on Amazon Bedrock, validated against the Subjective Units of Distress Scale (SUDS), Work and Social Adjustment Scale (WSAS), PHQ-9, and GAD-7, it serves undiagnosed users and diagnosed patients alike. Clinician-validated by three practising doctors. Built on AWS serverless with Kiro.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Veloquity - The Agentic Evidence Intelligent Platform Turning Raw Feedback into Evidence-Driven Decisions
trending.description: Decisions don’t fail from too little data - they fail from too much noise. Veloquity, an agentic evidence intelligence platform, filters that noise by transforming fragmented feedback into validated evidence and delivering explainable, prioritized recommendations with full source-to-decision traceability that guides human decisions. READ ON TO SEE HOW.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: RetainIQ
trending.description: Detect knowledge concentration risk before it costs you. RetainIQ scores every critical topic 0–100 and triggers AI interventions. Zero docs effort required.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Ivy - The World's First Offline-Capable, Proactive AI Tutoring Agent
trending.description: A proactive AI tutoring agent powered by Amazon Bedrock that monitors student progress, initiates outbound voice calls, and runs on-device inference for offline learning addressing educational inequity for millions of Ethiopian students with intermittent connectivity.
